# =============================================================================
#  LAMD Project — Python Dependency Lockfile
#
#  This file pins every dependency to an EXACT version so that all team
#  members and CI runners produce an identical virtual environment.
#
#  Setup instructions for a new machine:
#    python -m venv venv
#    # Windows:  venv\Scripts\activate
#    # Mac/Linux: source venv/bin/activate
#    pip install -r requirements.txt
#
#  To update a dependency (do NOT edit this file manually):
#    pip install --upgrade <package> && pip freeze > requirements.txt
# =============================================================================

# ── Phase 1: Data Pipeline ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Data manipulation and CSV reading (used by 3_build_dataset.py)
pandas==2.2.0

# HTTP requests for APK downloading
requests==2.31.0

# Loads secrets from the local .env file into os.environ at runtime
python-dotenv==1.0.1

# Required by pandas 2.x to silence the pyarrow deprecation warning
pyarrow==15.0.0

# ── Phase 2: LLM Inference + Evaluation ─────────────────────────────────────

# OpenAI API client (GPT-4o-mini — default backend, as used in LAMD paper)
openai>=1.0.0

# Google Gemini API client (new SDK)
google-genai>=0.2.0

# Token counting for context window management
tiktoken>=0.5.0

# Progress bars for long-running inference
tqdm>=4.65.0

# Metrics computation (F1, precision, recall, confusion matrix)
scikit-learn>=1.3.0

# PDF text extraction (for reading research papers)
PyMuPDF>=1.23.0

# ── Phase 3: RAG Pipeline (Cloud) ────────────────────────────────────────
qdrant-client>=1.7.0
fastembed>=0.2.0
